title: Better Carved Pumking On Player Head
description: Better Carved Pumking On Player Head + No Pumpking Blur For Pvp Looks Very Cool!
body:
# Better Carved Pumpking🎃 

Are you tired of the default carved pumpkin blocking your view and ruining your focus during intense PvP fights? This pack is here to completely change your experience!

This resource pack redesigns the carved pumpkin specifically for PvP players who want better visibility, smoother gameplay, and a clean aesthetic while wearing a pumpkin. Every detail of the pumpkin has been adjusted to make sure it helps you during combat instead of distracting you.

## ⚔️ Why this pack is perfect for PvP?
In fast-paced PvP situations, even a small distraction can cost you the fight. The default pumpkin overlay can feel annoying and limit your vision. This pack solves that problem by providing a much cleaner and more optimized look when you wear a pumpkin, allowing you to focus fully on your opponent.

🎯 Better Visibility = Better Gameplay
With improved visuals, you can react faster, track enemies more easily, and perform better in clutch situations like MLG, duels, or intense fights.

💻 Lightweight & Smooth Performance
This pack is designed to be simple and optimized, meaning it won’t affect your FPS. Perfect for low-end PCs as well!

🛠️ Designed with PvP in mind
Every change in this pack is made only for PvP advantages. It is not meant to be realistic or aesthetic for normal gameplay.

### ⚠️ Important Note:
This pack is NOT recommended for building, survival, or creative gameplay. The pumpkin texture is modified only for combat efficiency, so it may look unusual or out of place when used for decoration or building.
